source: Apple Configuration Profile Reference; MVT ConfigurationProfiles module
note: These are payload TYPES that warrant review when they appear in an UNRECOGNISED profile. Presence alone is not malicious (employers/carriers use these legitimately); iScout flags the combination of a high-risk payload and an unknown/unexpected organisation for human review.

payload_types.risk: Mobile Device Management — persistent remote administration of the device.
Installs a root CA certificate — enables HTTPS interception (MITM).
Installs a certificate — can enable HTTPS interception.
Installs a certificate — can enable HTTPS interception.
Installs a certificate + private key — can enable HTTPS interception.
Managed VPN — can route and inspect all network traffic.
Per-app managed VPN — can route/inspect app traffic.
Web content filter — can monitor and redirect browsing (inspect FilterType=Plugin, PluginBundleID, FilterSockets).
Overrides notification settings (flagged suspicious by MVT).
